item.title: You can’t have a complete understanding of what is happening in Iran in a vacuum of the extreme horrendous crimes that Israel is...
item.description:
You can’t have a complete understanding of what is happening in Iran in a vacuum of the extreme horrendous crimes that Israel is committed currently

item.title: We will lose, but the Oligarchs might be able to scrape out a little bit of money during it

item.title: There is a long history of this and this is not surprising in fact what is surprising is that this came to light at all
item.description:
There is a long history of this and this is not surprising in fact what is surprising is that this came to light at all. The source for this is democracy now.

item.title: Once again, this is a show if you don’t think it’s that deep, you can disagree with me, but I also do think I’m right and I thin...
item.description:
Once again, this is a show if you don’t think it’s that deep, you can disagree with me, but I also do think I’m right and I think it’s important that we start recognising how pretty much￼ everything in the American or western media ecosystem fits this particular narrative



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)
